mapper.sql: select nd.problem_id, nd.task_no, nd.task_name, nd.product, DATE_FORMAT(nd.internal_closure_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as internal_closure_date, DATE_FORMAT(nd.functional_test_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as functional_test_date, DATE_FORMAT(nd.production_version_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as production_version_date, nd.schedule_status, nd.problem_no, nd.problem_level, nd.current_status, nd.submit_date, nd.settle_date, nd.verify_date, nd.whether_defect, nd.whether_overtime, nd.whether_pro_recurrence, nd.whether_att_required, nd.whether_update_version, nd.solution_time_over_one_day, nd.defect_desc, nd.production_year, nd.batch_id, nd.dept_id, nd.remarks, nd.del_flag, nd.create_by, nd.create_time, nd.update_by, nd.update_time, COALESCE(b.batch_no, nd.pro_batch_no) as batch_no, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(b.plan_production_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(nd.plan_production_date, '%Y-%m-%d')) as plan_production_date, COALESCE(d.dept_name, nd.subtask_team) as dept_name, COALESCE(uc.nick_name, nd.creator_name) as create_by_name, COALESCE(uu.nick_name, nd.modifier_name) as update_by_name from pm_nobatch_prolist_defect nd left join pm_production_batch b on nd.batch_id = b.batch_id left join sys_dept d on nd.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user uc on nd.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = uc.user_name left join sys_user uu on nd.update_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = uu.user_name
mapper.insert: insert into pm_nobatch_prolist_defect ( task_no, task_name, product, internal_closure_date, functional_test_date, production_version_date, schedule_status, problem_no, problem_level, current_status, submit_date, settle_date, verify_date, whether_defect, whether_overtime, whether_pro_recurrence, whether_att_required, whether_update_version, solution_time_over_one_day, defect_desc, production_year, batch_id, dept_id, remarks, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{taskNo}, #{taskName}, #{product}, #{internalClosureDate}, #{functionalTestDate}, #{productionVersionDate}, #{scheduleStatus}, #{problemNo}, #{problemLevel}, #{currentStatus}, #{submitDate}, #{settleDate}, #{verifyDate}, #{whetherDefect}, #{whetherOvertime}, #{whetherProRecurrence}, #{whetherAttRequired}, #{whetherUpdateVersion}, #{solutionTimeOverOneDay}, #{defectDesc}, #{productionYear}, #{batchId}, #{deptId}, #{remarks}, '0', #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.update:
update pm_nobatch_prolist_defect
task_no = #{taskNo}, task_name = #{taskName}, product = #{product}, internal_closure_date = #{internalClosureDate}, functional_test_date = #{functionalTestDate}, production_version_date = #{productionVersionDate}, schedule_status = #{scheduleStatus}, problem_no = #{problemNo}, problem_level = #{problemLevel}, current_status = #{currentStatus}, submit_date = #{submitDate}, settle_date = #{settleDate}, verify_date = #{verifyDate},
whether_defect = #{whetherDefect}, whether_overtime = #{whetherOvertime}, whether_pro_recurrence = #{whetherProRecurrence}, whether_att_required = #{whetherAttRequired}, whether_update_version = #{whetherUpdateVersion}, solution_time_over_one_day = #{solutionTimeOverOneDay}, defect_desc = #{defectDesc}, production_year = #{productionYear}, batch_id = #{batchId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where problem_id = #{problemId}
update pm_nobatch_prolist_defect set del_flag = '1', problem_no = concat(problem_no, '_DEL_', problem_id) where problem_id in #{id}
mapper.select: select batch_id as batchId, batch_no as batchNo from pm_production_batch where production_year = #{year} order by sort_order, batch_id
select DATE_FORMAT(plan_production_date, '%Y-%m-%d') from pm_production_batch where batch_id = #{batchId}
